name: Stevanato Group S.p.A. Ordinary Shares
summary: Stevanato Group S.p.A. is a global provider of drug containment, drug delivery, and diagnostic solutions to the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and life sciences industries. The company manufactures a wide range of products including glass vials, syringes, cartridges, and plastic components. Stevanato Group is headquartered in Piombino Dese, Italy.
